hooks.command: $cmd = ([System.Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json).tool_input.command; if ($cmd -notmatch 'vercel.*--prod') { exit 0 }; $lock = 'C:\Users\francesco\progetti\hospitality\tests\.smoke-lock'; if (Test-Path $lock) { $age = ((Get-Date) - (Get-Item $lock).LastWriteTime).TotalMinutes; if ($age -lt 5) { Write-Host '[smoke] Altro test in corso, skip.'; exit 0 }; Remove-Item $lock -Force }; New-Item -ItemType File -Path $lock -Force | Out-Null; try { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; Set-Location 'C:\Users\francesco\progetti\hospitality\tests'; npm test; $code = $LASTEXITCODE } finally { Remove-Item $lock -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ($code -ne 0) { exit 2 }
hooks.rewakeSummary: Smoke test falliti dopo il deploy
